---
title: "Info collections"
subtitle: ""
author: "Sung Rye Park"
date: "`r format(Sys.Date())`"
output:  
  rmdformats::robobook: 
    code_folding: hide 
    number_sections: FALSE
    toc_depth: 6
    toc_float: false
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo=F, fig.align = "left", 
                      message=F, warning=F,
                      results = "markup",
                      error = TRUE,
                      highlight = TRUE,
                      prompt = FALSE,
                      tidy = FALSE)
```

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(DT)
```


# 2024 

[DS-1062a; 2024](Daiichi_2024_index_info.html)
